ci_matrix_evidence: Workflow defines a lifecycle-smoke job with fail-fast false and matrix os values windows-latest, macos-latest, and ubuntu-latest. Each matrix run performs actions/setup-node@v4 with Node 20, npm ci, npm run check, npm test, then a real CLI lifecycle smoke against a disposable project covering doctor, tasks, run build, run fail, managed start, duplicate start refusal, ps, logs, stop, idempotent stop, clean dry-run, clean --safe, and clean --all confirmation refusal.
